success_alert.us: You logged into a secure area!

unauthorized_alert.us: You must login to view the secure area!

successful_registration_alert.us: Successfully registered, you can log in now.

short_username_alert.us: Username must be at least 3 characters long.

wrong_username_registration_alert.us: Invalid username. Usernames can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens, must be between 3 and 39 characters, and cannot start or end with a hyphen.

short_password_alert.us: Password must be at least 4 characters long.

email_sent.us: An e-mail has been sent to you which explains how to reset your password.

wrong_otp.us: The provided OTP code is incorrect. Please check your code and try again.
